publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

sourceDesc.p: Work of the literatures of Ethiopia and Eritrea
A TEI file converted from the ETHIO-authority google spreadsheet

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: added data from the database by Augustine Dickinson
updated data for stanzas 155-157 and tarafa malkǝʾ from the database by Augustine Dickinson

bibl.title: Répertoire des Salam et Malkeʾe contenus dans les manuscrits éthiopiens des bibliothèques d’Europe

series.t:title: Abhandlungen der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften
series.t:biblScope: 68, Abhandlungen der philologisch-historischen Klasse der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften, 33/4

bibl.biblScope: 68, Abhandlungen der philologisch-historischen Klasse der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften, 33/4

div.note: The following division into stanzas follows Aethiopische MarienhymnenAbhandlungen der Sächsischen Akademie der WissenschaftenAdolfGrohmannAdolfGrohmannLeipzigBei B. G. Teubner1919Abhandlungen der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften68, Abhandlungen der philologisch-historischen Klasse der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften, 33/468, Abhandlungen der philologisch-historischen Klasse der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften, 33/4https://digital.slub-dresden.de/werkansicht/dlf/447/9/66-156 and መልክአ፡ ጉባኤ፡ Malkǝʾa gubāʾeAugustineDickinson20202024-09-24https://malkeagubae.com/.
Text taken from መልክአ፡ ጉባኤ፡ Malkǝʾa gubāʾeAugustineDickinson20202024-09-24https://malkeagubae.com/

lg.l: በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሕያው፡ በልሳነ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘኢይትነገር፨
ወበእንተ፡ ዝ፡ ማርያም፡ ሶበ፡ ሐወዘኒ፡ መዐዛ፡ ጣዕሙ፨
እንዘ፡ ትብሊ፡ ኢትጐጕዒ፡ አንብቦተ፡ ዛቲ፡ ጸሎት፨
ዘሰ፡ ይብል፡ ኣፈቅረኪ፡ ወኢያፈቅር፡ ተኣምረኪ፡ ክርስቲያናዊ፨
አንሰ፡ እቤ፡ በማኅሌተ፡ ሰሎሞን፡ ወልደ፡ ሰንቃዊ፨
እንበለ፡ ትትወለዲ፡ ድንግል፡ እምቤተ፡ ክህነት፡ ወንግሥ፨
መድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡ ኮነ፡ ደመ፡ ጽጌኪ፡ ክርስቶስ፨
አመ፡ ቤተ፡ መቅደስ፡ ቦእኪ፡ እንዘ፡ ትጠብዊ፡ ሐሊበ፡ ሐና፨
ምስለ፡ አብያጺሁ፡ ከመ፡ አብ፡ እንዘ፡ ይሴስየኪ፡ መና፨
እንዘ፡ ተሐቅፊዮ፡ ለሕፃንኪ፡ ጽጌ፡ ፀዓዳ፡ ወቀይሕ፨
ውስተ፡ ቤተ፡ መቅደስ፡ ጌስኪ፡ በዕለተ፡ ተኣምር፡ ዘንጽሕ፨
እንተ፡ ጸገይኪ፡ አስካለ፡ በዕለተ፡ ተከለኪ፡ እደ፡ የማኑ፡
መኑ፡ ጠቢብ፡ እንበለ፡ ጽጌኪ፡ ዘየአምር፡ ጥዩቀ፨
ከዋክብተ፡ ሰማይ፡ ኈሊቆ፡ ወኆፃ፡ ባሕር፡ ድቁቀ፨
ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ በጽጌ፡ መላእክት፡ ትጉሃን፨
ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ በጽጌ፡ ነቢያት፡ ቅዱሳን፨
ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ በጽጌ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ሰባክያን፨
ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ በጽጌ፡ ሰማዕታት፡ ወጻድቃን፨
ሰላም፡ ለኪ፡ መንበረ፡ ፀሓይ፡ ሰማይ፡ ዘከዋክብት፡ አክሊላ፨
ሰላም፡ ለኪ፡ አመ፡ ይወፅእ፡ አዳም፡ እምሀገረ፡ ጽጌ፡ ገነት፨
ሰላም፡ ለኪ፡ ለለ፡ እብለኪ፡ ሰላመ፡ ከመ፡ ገብርኤል፡ መልአክ፨
ሰላም፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ ዳግመ፡ ተኣምረኪ፡ ክሥቲ፨
